I couldn't find an event exactly titled "Dental check-up," but I did find this calendar event that looks like the same appointment:

- Title: Dentist Appointment  
- ID: 5  
- When: 2024-05-18 09:00 — 2024-05-18 10:00 (duration 1 hour)  
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic  
- Participants: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com

Before I proceed, I need two quick clarifications:

1) Is this the event you want moved to 2024-05-20 at 10:00 AM?  
2) What is the clinic’s email address to notify? If you don’t have it, I can search your contacts/inbox for the clinic — do you want me to do that?

Also: would you like a custom message in the notification to the clinic (and to you), or is the default calendar reschedule notification fine? If you confirm (and provide/allow me to find the clinic email), I will add the clinic as a participant (so they receive the reschedule notification) and reschedule the event, keeping the original 1-hour duration.
